contactRole: Founding Customer Experience Manager-Customer Acceleration and Expert Program
headline: Built for SlashExperts
subheadline: AI infrastructure to integrate peer-conversations with CRM and shorten B2B sales cycles

challenges.title: Scaling Team
challenges.desc: With only 9 employees, SlashExperts faces bottlenecks in managing rapid growth. This slows customer onboarding processes. Building scalable systems is essential for their San Francisco-based operations.

challenges.title: CRM Integration
challenges.desc: SlashExperts needs seamless CRM connections to track buyer insights. Gaps in integration lead to lost attribution data. This hampers their ability to influence pipelines effectively.

challenges.title: Shortening Sales Cycles
challenges.desc: B2B buyers demand trust from peers over vendors. SlashExperts struggles to convert these interactions quickly. Their platform must accelerate deals to maintain competitive edge.

challenges.title: Trust Building
challenges.desc: As a new company founded in 2024, SlashExperts must establish reliable revenue channels. Limited resources make it hard to scale peer conversations. This affects their ability to turn advocacy into measurable growth.

deliverables.title: CRM Integration System
deliverables.desc: Builds AI tools to link peer-conversations with existing CRM platforms like Salesforce, providing real-time buyer insights

deliverables.title: Sales Cycle Accelerator
deliverables.desc: Creates automated workflows for connecting prospects with customer advocates, shortening deal times through targeted interactions

deliverables.title: Advocacy Analytics Hub
deliverables.desc: Develops a dashboard for tracking and measuring customer advocacy impacts, integrating with SlashExperts' platform for better ROI analysis

deliverables.title: Onboarding Automation Suite
deliverables.desc: Designs AI-driven systems to streamline customer and expert program onboarding, reducing manual efforts in their startup environment

engagementSteps.title: Discovery Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Assess current sales infrastructure and identify key integration points with CRM systems.

engagementSteps.title: Build and Prototype
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Develop AI prototypes for peer-conversation tools and test them against SlashExperts' sales cycles.

engagementSteps.title: Deployment and Optimization
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Roll out the full system and refine based on early usage data to ensure seamless CRM integration.

faqItems.question: What is AI sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It's a set of tools that automate and optimize B2B sales processes using AI.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with CRM?
faqItems.answer: Our system connects directly with platforms like Salesforce for real-time data flow.

faqItems.question: Will this shorten our sales cycles?
faqItems.answer: Yes, by leveraging peer conversations to build trust and accelerate buyer decisions.

faqItems.question: Is this customizable for startups?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely, tailored to fit small teams like SlashExperts with scalable features.

faqItems.question: What tech stack do you use?
faqItems.answer: We build with modern tools that match your needs, ensuring compatibility.

faqItems.question: How much does this cost?
faqItems.answer: Costs vary based on scope, but we focus on delivering value for your $2M funding level.

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Handles CRM integration for buyer insights

stackItems.name: HubSpot
stackItems.role: Manages marketing automation and lead tracking

stackItems.name: Python
stackItems.role: Powers AI models for data analysis and automation

stackItems.name: AWS
stackItems.role: Provides cloud infrastructure for scalable deployments

stackItems.name: Tableau
stackItems.role: Visualizes sales data and analytics dashboards
